tagline: Civic space for the digital age
taglineBody: Public infrastructure, not a private platform. Real identity, not anonymity. Discourse, not disruption.
needInvite: You need an invite to join
usernameHint: Letters, numbers, and underscores only. Username is only used for logging in.

invitePhase.title: Beta phase — join by invite
invitePhase.description: Eulesia is in beta. Invited members can join without identity verification, but once strong authentication (bank credentials / EUDI Wallet) is enabled, account access will require verification.

betaNotice.title: Beta terms
betaNotice.realName: Use your real first name and last name. Pseudonyms and fake accounts will be removed immediately.
betaNotice.strongAuth: Strong authentication will be enabled in the coming weeks. After that, account access will require verification via bank credentials or EUDI Wallet.

realNameNotice: Use your real name — pseudonyms and fake accounts will be removed.

noAttentionEconomy.title: No attention economy
noAttentionEconomy.description: No algorithmic feed, no infinite scroll, no engagement metrics. Your time is yours.

institutions.title: Institutions as participants
institutions.description: Public institutions participate as civic actors, not advertisers or "verified brands".

socialNotSurveillance.title: Social, not surveillance
socialNotSurveillance.description: Connection with communities and neighbors. No data harvesting, no ad targeting.

pleaseLogin: Please log in to view your profile
